title: Vietnamese Com Tam (Fatty, Dense Beef)
description: A rich and flavorful Vietnamese beef dish that's perfect for a special occasion. The fatty beef and coriander flavors will leave you wanting more.
instructions: Grill the beef brisket over high heat until it's nicely charred, about 5 minutes per side.
Let the beef rest for 5 minutes before slicing it thinly against the grain.
In a large skillet, heat 1 tablespoon of coconut oil over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced beef and cook until it's browned and crispy, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the grated ginger and garlic to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chopped coriander leaves to the skillet and cook for another minute.
Stir in the fish sauce and lime juice, and cook for 1 minute.
Serve the beef hot, garnished with additional coriander leaves if desired.
